name: specd-studio
description: Deliver SpecD Studio as a layered product on top of @specd/core: an HTTP API (@specd/api), shared data client (@specd/client), React IDE (@specd/ui), web and desktop hosts, and CLI serve commands. The UI exposes change and spec workflows with explicit save/validate, preview/diff, and polling aligned with CLI honesty rules. Core gains manifest updatedAt and dedicated artifact load/save use cases so API and UI never duplicate repository rules.

history.description: Deliver SpecD Studio as a layered product on top of @specd/core: an HTTP API (@specd/api), shared data client (@specd/client), React IDE (@specd/ui), web and desktop hosts, and CLI serve commands. The UI exposes change and spec workflows with explicit save/validate, preview/diff, and polling aligned with CLI honesty rules. Core gains manifest updatedAt and dedicated artifact load/save use cases so API and UI never duplicate repository rules.
